_categoryDeprecated: category will be removed in v1.x+2; consume taxonomy.{group,task} instead
description: English speech-to-text on Snapdragon QNN HTP. / 基于 QNN HTP 的英文语音识别。
longDescription: OpenAI Whisper base.en (~74M params) running on Snapdragon QNN HTP. Two-stage encoder/decoder pipeline with 30-second sequential chunking. Outputs English text with chunk-level timestamps. Adapted from the QAI AppBuilder reference sample whisper_base_en.py. App Builder Pack — fully isolated from features/model-builder.

task.description: Always 'transcribe'. Translate is not supported by base.en.

fullText.description: All segment texts concatenated in time order, segments separated by a single space. Empty string if the audio contained only silence / non-speech.

segments.description: Time-aligned recognized segments, sorted by start ASC. Boundaries are 30-second chunk edges; granularity is +-0.5 s in practice.

start.description: Segment start time in seconds, relative to the start of the input audio.

end.description: Segment end time in seconds, relative to the start of the input audio.

text.description: Recognized English text for this segment.

conf.description: Mean per-step softmax probability of the chosen token along the decoded path. Rough proxy, not a calibrated probability.

sendToChatPrompt.en: This is the English speech-to-text transcript produced by the [Whisper Base (English)] model. Please summarize the content.
sendToChatPrompt.zh-CN: 这是通过 [Whisper Base (English)] 模型对音频的英文语音识别结果，请对这个转写内容进行总结。
sendToChatPrompt.zh-TW: 這是通過 [Whisper Base (English)] 模型對音訊的英文語音識別結果，請對這個轉寫內容進行總結。
